title: Wathe Extra Items
description: This Mod adds extra items to WATHE, this mod is specifically made for RUMBLE PARTY so they dont yell at me for updating the mod and i would like to share it for other people to use as i will continue to update it.
body:
# What Does This Mod Add?

Wathe Extra Items is a small Fabric mod that adds immersive, roleplay-focused items to Minecraft.

## The items that are included are 

Consumables:

- Highball
  
- Cigar:
  
  Emits campfire-style smoke particles from the player’s view direction
  
  Plays subtle ambient fire sounds when used

- Coal Coke

  If you eat it you get Darkness and Nausea cos why would you eat coal?
  
- More to come

Books: 

- Contain Easter Eggs and are time accurate! (kinda)

A Radio:

- Will have a GUI that contains music, audio from me and easter eggs for people to find when developed

A Pocket Watch:

- Uses local time on your PC to tell you what time it is!

The mod is intended for roleplay servers, social gameplay, and events, rather than survival progression or balance.

# Reason for me Posting!

This mod was created for WATHE Specifically for the RUMBLE PARTY community to add new items they ask for such as Cigars(the first addition), as i host the server for them to play Harpy Express, but if you would like you could add it to your own [Harpy Express](https://modrinth.com/modpack/harpy-express) packs for you to use with your friends or to make your maps!

# Compatibility and Use

REQUIRES [Wathe: Murder Mystery](https://modrinth.com/mod/wathe)
And FABRIC API

As development continues and my Java modding knowledge improves, this project may evolve into a dedicated WATHE addon in the future.

Wathe Extra Items is not survival-focused and does not aim to provide balanced progression or crafting mechanics.

## Dependencies

Fabric Loader

Fabric API

Subject to change as development continues.

## Updates & Feedback

This mod will continue to be updated over time.

If you would like to suggest new items or provide feedback, please use the contact links in the project sidebar.
